steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that for the same favorite recording, musicians prefer higher optimal volumes than nonmusicians. The question asks what follows if a musician's optimal volume for 'Heartbeats' is 82.2 dB.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the nonmusician would find 82.2 dB less enjoyable than a lower volume': Since nonmusicians prefer lower volumes than musicians for the same recording, the nonmusician's optimal is below 82.2 dB, so 82.2 dB would be past their peak enjoyment. ✓
  • Choice B: Compares different recordings, not the same one. ✗
  • Choice C: Overstates the relationship by claiming the nonmusician would dislike the recording entirely. ✗
  • Choice D: Reverses the direction, implying nonmusicians prefer higher volumes. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
